summary.authoritative_rule: the next complete training route should move from frozen local negative labels into staged event-attention-capital divergence supervision, then only later into state-machine integration and future shadow modules while execution remains blocked

phase_rows.objective: lift local negative families into environment-level semantics rather than action rules
separate event trigger validity from heat capture and decoy behavior
separate true capital selection from mere heat concentration
bind environment and role labels into lockout/unlock/reentry/add governance
only after the label chain stabilizes, trial shadow-only modules for divergence and reentry

label_rows.why: strong local names inside a weak board must remain negative context rather than restart evidence
captures the user's core observation that heat and tradable selection can diverge
formalizes weak-board / strong-symbol concentration as a money-allocation mismatch
becomes the higher-level veto candidate above add/reentry
prevents news presence from being mistaken for a valid board impulse
identifies who captures board attention without assuming they are the main attack target
directly matches the user's hypothesis about hot names that absorb focus but do not become the real leader
should only be learned after attention and decoy states are separated
requires not just stock strength but evidence of durable board followthrough
should not be promoted before the environment and attention-capital chain is stable
current boundary policy and raw-only post-lockout coverage still block lawful unlock evaluation
representation learning is too unconstrained before the core supervision chain is labeled

blocker_rows.reading: post-lockout board-state derivation remains frozen, so unlock and reentry handoff cannot be lawfully extended
reduce execution still has four blockers and add execution authority remains blocked
current positive add rules remain too dense outside the seed surface and cannot be used as a portable selection authority
add still lacks a naturally observed single-slot template, so later action layers must stay conservative
event sources exist locally, but the divergence label chain has not yet been formalized into supervision registries

agent_rows.primary_recommendation: build environment semantics before action semantics
agent_rows.high_signal_point: upgrade local concentration into attention_distorted -> capital_misaligned_with_board -> board_fragile_divergence
connect event/attention/capital layers to lockout/unlock/reentry while keeping execution blocked

agent_rows.primary_recommendation: separate heat from true selection before learning leaders
agent_rows.high_signal_point: learn attention_anchor vs attention_decoy first, then capital_true_selection, and only then followthrough_leader

interpretation: V1.34HS is a route-setting audit rather than another local alpha search.

The route is intentionally layered: first learn environment distortion and event-attention divergence, then learn true capital selection, then integrate those labels into lockout/unlock/reentry governance, and only later consider shadow modules.
